title: Financial Planning and Forecasting
shortSummary: Budgets, forecasts, and scenario planning. How to plan for growth without gambling your runway.
whyItMatters: Without a forecast, every spending decision is a guess. Financial planning turns intuition into informed bets with measurable downside.
coreConcepts: A budget is what you plan to spend — a forecast is what you expect to happen
Rolling 3-month forecasts are more useful than rigid annual budgets
Scenario planning (best/base/worst case) reveals how sensitive your business is to assumptions
The purpose of a forecast is not prediction — it is preparation
